recipes.description:
Auto-recorded from browser session default. Goal: Pre-flight page map (refresh by calling inspect_dom / get_page_source for specifics):
- URL: https://duckduckgo.com/
- Title: DuckDuckGo - Protection. Privacy. Peace of mind.
- Frameworks: React, Next.js
- Background paint target: `body` (computed #ffffff). Use this for "change the background" requests.
- Palette (hex -> roles):

  - #222222 -> text, button-text
  - #00000
